meanings.usage: 用来强调事物最核心的性质或特征，可修饰形容词、动词或整个句子
用来描述群体、国家等内部存在分歧、无法统一行动的状态
表示两个事物之间存在关联的变化，一个变化伴随另一个同步发生
形容地区、国家等经济、社会发展水平较低，注意该词带有一定贬义，正式语境中常用 less developed 替代

meanings.meaning: 招致；遭受；带来（成本、损失等）
meanings.usage: 及物动词，常搭配 cost, expense, loss, debt 等表示负面结果的名词
指对组织、机构、国家等的日常事务进行管理，名词形式为administration

meanings.meaning: 运营成本；管理费用；经常开支
meanings.usage: 商务语境常用，指企业运营的间接成本，常用复数形式overheads
正式用语，常用结构be analogous to/with，表示两者具有相似性可做类比

meanings.meaning: 主动性；积极性；首创精神
meanings.usage: 不可数名词，常用搭配take initiative表示“采取主动，发挥主动性”
正式用语，指某人的职权、活动或兴趣的范围，常用搭配within one's sphere
指工厂、工地等管理基层工人的主管人员，复数形式为foremen
商务常用词，指公司按股份分配给股东的利润，也可引申为付出带来的回报
指政府部门的非军事雇佣人员，对应集体名词为civil service（行政部门）

meanings.meaning: 过度地；不适当地；过分地
meanings.usage: 用来修饰形容词或副词，强调程度超出合理范围

phrases.usage: 表示维持某事物正常运转、某人正常工作

examples.en: It takes a lot of effort to keep a large company running smoothly.
examples.zh: 维持一家大公司的顺利运转需要付出很多努力。

phrases.usage: 商务用语，指企业维持运营、不倒闭

examples.en: Many small shops had to cut costs sharply to stay in business during the pandemic.
examples.zh: 疫情期间很多小商店不得不大幅削减成本才能维持经营。

phrases.usage: 表示关注、涉及、以…为主题，后接名词或动名词

examples.en: This research is concerned with the impact of social media on teenagers' mental health.
examples.zh: 这项研究关注社交媒体对青少年心理健康的影响。

phrases.usage: 表示属于某人的职权、责任或兴趣范围

examples.en: Employee training issues fall within the HR manager's sphere of responsibility.
examples.zh: 员工培训问题属于人力资源经理的职责范围。

phrases.usage: 表示约束某人、使某人遵守规则、行为合规

examples.en: The new company rules are designed to keep all employees in line with corporate standards.
examples.zh: 新的公司规定旨在约束所有员工符合企业规范。

phrases.usage: 表示支付、承担某项费用，相当于cover the expense of

examples.en: The local government will meet the expense of building the new community library.
examples.zh: 当地政府将承担新建社区图书馆的费用。

phrases.usage: 引导状语从句，表示“在…程度上；就…而言”，用来限定陈述的适用范围

examples.en: To the extent that you practice every day, your English speaking skills will improve quickly.
examples.zh: 只要你每天练习，你的英语口语能力就会快速提升。

phrases.usage: 表示“为了…的利益；符合…的利益”，后接人或组织

examples.en: It is in the interests of the whole family to choose a house near good schools.
examples.zh: 选一所靠近好学校的房子符合全家的利益。

grammar.title: where引导的地点状语从句引申用法
grammar.definition: where除了引导表示具体地点的状语从句，还可以引申为引导抽象条件的状语从句，表示“在…的情况下”
grammar.structure: Where + 条件/情况描述, + 主句
grammar.usage: 用来表达在某种特定的抽象情形下会产生对应的结果，常见于正式论述类文本

examples.en: Where the cost of government is high, resources for development are correspondingly low.
examples.zh: 在政府成本高的地方，可用于发展的资源就相应较少。

examples.en: Where there is a will, there is a way.

grammar.title: as引导的比例状语从句
grammar.definition: as可以引导表示同步变化的状语从句，意思是“随着…；与…同时”，体现两个变化的关联性
grammar.structure: As + 从句（描述变化）, + so + 主句（描述同步的变化）
grammar.usage: 用于说明两个事物的变化成正比关系，主句中的so可以省略，也可以保留增强语气

examples.en: As administrative overheads rise, so the earnings of the business after meeting the expense of administration, will fall.
examples.zh: 随着管理费用的上升，企业在支付管理费用后的收益就会下降。

examples.en: As you grow older, so you will understand more about the importance of health.
examples.zh: 随着年龄增长，你会越来越明白健康的重要性。

grammar.title: It作形式主语的主语从句
grammar.definition: 当主语是较长的从句时，为了避免句子头重脚轻，常用it作形式主语放在句首，真正的主语从句放在句末
grammar.structure: It + 被动语态/形容词 + that + 真正的主语从句
grammar.usage: 常见于正式论述中，用来引出普遍认知、需要说明的事实等，常见结构有it is said that, it should be noted that等

examples.en: And it should not be forgotten how small those resources are in a poor and backward country.
examples.zh: 不应忘记的是，在贫穷落后的国家，这些资源是多么匮乏。

examples.en: It is widely accepted that regular exercise is beneficial to physical and mental health.
examples.zh: 人们普遍认为规律锻炼对身心健康有益。

sentencePatterns.pattern: A may be illustrated by comparing the position of B with that of C.

original.en: This may be illustrated by comparing the position of a nation with that of a private business enterprise.
original.zh: 要说明这一点，可以把国家的状况和私营企业的状况做个比较。

imitations.en: The importance of time management may be illustrated by comparing the efficiency of people with good habits with that of people without plans.
imitations.zh: 要说明时间管理的重要性，可以把有良好习惯的人和没有规划的人的效率做个比较。

imitations.en: The harm of air pollution may be illustrated by comparing the health condition of residents in industrial areas with that of people in rural areas.
imitations.zh: 要说明空气污染的危害，可以把工业区居民和乡村居民的健康状况做个比较。

sentencePatterns.pattern: A in X are analogous to B in Y.

original.en: Such administrative overheads in a business are analogous to the cost of government in a nation.
original.zh: 企业的这类管理费用与国家的政府成本是类似的。

imitations.en: The heart in the human body is analogous to the engine in a car.
imitations.zh: 人体的心脏相当于汽车的发动机。

imitations.en: Teachers in a school are analogous to coaches in a sports team.
imitations.zh: 学校里的老师相当于运动队里的教练。

sentencePatterns.pattern: To the extent that..., ...do/does not require...

original.en: To the extent that the people can be relied on to behave in a loyal and responsible manner, the government does not require armies of police and civil servants to keep them in order.
original.zh: 只要人民的行为是忠诚可靠、有责任心的，政府就不需要大批警察和公务员来维持秩序。

imitations.en: To the extent that all team members can be trusted to finish their tasks on time, the project manager does not require extra supervisors to check the progress every day.
imitations.zh: 只要所有团队成员都能按时完成任务，项目经理就不需要额外的监督人员每天检查进度。

imitations.en: To the extent that students are interested in the subject, teachers do not require strict rules to force them to attend classes.
imitations.zh: 只要学生对这门学科感兴趣，老师就不需要严格的规定来强迫他们上课。
